overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior exploring a snow-covered Japanese temple complex. The character ascends stone stairs, overlooks a frozen village pond, passes through a large red gate, and enters a white birch forest during a light snowfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered temple courtyard with ascending stone stairs

events.description: character turns and begins ascending wide stone stairs
reaches top of stairs, view opens to hilltop overlook

agents.ego_description: samurai in traditional armor walking up snow-covered stone stairs away from temple courtyard

entered.detail: red wooden temple building with snow-covered curved roof and red walls
traditional Japanese stone lantern with snow accumulation on top
burning fire pit with orange flames near the temple entrance
wide stone staircase covered in snow leading uphill
stacked stone retaining wall lining the stair path

segments.scene_description: The samurai character begins in a snow-covered temple courtyard, passing a stone lantern and campfire before ascending a wide set of stone stairs. The traditional red temple building remains visible to the left as the character climbs higher.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop overlook with view of frozen village pond

events.description: view opens to reveal frozen pond and village buildings in valley below
character turns away from overlook and continues toward distant red gate

agents.ego_description: pausing briefly to observe the village vista with frozen pond, then walking along the cliffside path

entered.detail: frozen body of water in the valley below reflecting the grey sky
wooden footbridge crossing the frozen pond
traditional Japanese village buildings with snow-covered roofs
large red wooden temple gate with white snow-covered roof

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the view opens to a wide overlook revealing a frozen village pond with a wooden bridge and distant buildings. The character pauses briefly to observe the vista before turning and continuing along the path toward a large red gate visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to large red temple gate

events.description: character passes through the large red gate into the snowy forest beyond

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through the large red temple gate into the forest

notable_agents.action: villager in dark clothing standing near the gate entrance

entered.detail: white snow-laden trees visible through the gate opening

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the large red temple gate, passing a stone lantern and an NPC villager standing near the entrance. At 38 seconds, the character walks through the gate, transitioning from the temple complex into a snowy forest with white trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered forest path with white birch trees

agents.ego_description: walking down the snowy forest path surrounded by white trees and falling snow

entered.detail: narrow snow-covered trail winding through the white forest

segments.scene_description: Now through the gate, the character walks down a narrow snow-covered forest path surrounded by dense white birch trees. Stone lanterns line the path as the character continues deeper into the winter forest with snow falling gently.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a structured temple courtyard into the depths of a snowy birch forest. It begins in a snow-covered courtyard, passing a stone lantern and campfire while ascending a wide set of stone stairs beside a traditional red temple building. As the character reaches the summit, the view opens to a wide overlook of a frozen village pond and wooden bridge before the path leads toward a distant red gate. The scene then shifts as the character passes a villager and walks through the gate, transitioning from the temple complex into a winter woodland. Finally, the camera follows the character down a narrow, snow-covered path lined with stone lanterns, moving deeper into a dense forest of white birch trees under a gentle snowfall.
